title: How to setup and use Claude Code for FREE  (Step-by-Step Guide)
summary: Video tutorial showing how to run Claude Code locally for free using Ollama and open-source LLMs like Qwen 3.5. Covers installation, configuration, and building an agentic AI travel application with Flask UI and multiple specialized AI agents without paid APIs.
